# Copilot Instructions

## Project Overview

This is a Python project for testing and using [spec-kit](https://github.com/mckingula/spec-kit). It is in early stages with no source code committed yet.

## Language & Tooling

- **Language:** Python
- **Linting:** Ruff (implied by `.ruff_cache/` in .gitignore)
- **Environment:** Use a virtual environment (`.venv/`)

## Conventions

- Follow PEP 8 style guidelines
- Use Ruff for linting and formatting

For additional context about technologies to be used, project structure,
shell commands, and other important information, read the current plan
